text:
Created attachment 245356
patch

This fixes for me:
...
 69857 ln       CALL  symlink(0x7fffffffed86,0x7fffffffdde0)
 69857 ln       NAMI  "/root"
 69857 ln       NAMI  "/tmp//root"
 69857 ln       RET   symlink 0
 69857 ln       CALL  exit(0)


but as far I understand same issue with link() syscall.
